title: Level 178
wikitext:
{{Background|file=Extendedcondense.jpg}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 178: "Anomaly Ahead!"}}
This won't be long.
[[File:Level178onceagain.jpg|center|2000px|link=]]
{{Class Undetermined}}
[[File:Condense.png|link=]]A photograph of '''Level 178'''.
==Description== '''Level 178''', also known as "Anomaly Ahead!" is a rainy network of intricate, overlapping highways. Its name is derived from the numerous anomalies frequently witnessed in the background of the road system. The level's size is theorized to be infinite, though individual roads span roughly only 497 kilometers — aside from the roads that abruptly end. The roads are all interconnected at certain points, though the connection is often haphazard or ineffective. Streetlights are present on the roads, illuminating the immense darkness caused by the absence of a discernible celestial body. It should be noted the distinctly unnatural curvature of the roads — some of which curve in particularly unnatural directions, often pivoting directly upwards or downwards.
Ambiance of '''Level 178'''.
Upon entering '''Level 178''', wanderers will find themselves fastened into the driver's seat of an automobile. For the time being, one will be unable to exit the vehicle, due to partial paralysis that limits movement beyond the arms and head. This will generally disappear after exiting the level, but it may persist long after that. Soon enough, the car will begin to operate itself, expeditiously navigating the highways while ignoring any sensible safety precautions. The automobile will disregard the non-Euclidean nature of the geometry and defy the laws of physics to traverse the chaotic infrastructure. Wanderers often undergo immense vertigo and dizziness while on '''Level 178''' as a result. After a long period of seemingly aimless navigation, provided that the vehicle has not catapulted into one of the pitfalls, the vehicle will reach a dead end, allowing one to enter a '''[[Level List|random level]]'''. Attempting to steer or dismantle the vehicle will result in rapid combustion. Upon close inspection, automobiles on '''Level 178''' seem to be enveloped by a thin layer of a gasoline. Wanderers ought to cleanse themselves after regaining corporeal control, as it is easily flammable and may linger on one's clothing or skin. Following an attempt to impair or control the car, fire will emanate from an unknown origin. Due to the gas coating the interior, it will quickly set aflame, resulting in an inescapable death.
[[File:Driving.png|link=]]An alleged image of '''Level 178'''.
Narrowly perceptible from within one's car, a vast city is prevalent beneath the configuration of roads. The scene consists of closely dispersed buildings and skyscrapers, sidewalks, roadways, among other customary elements of a city. The city is entirely composed of rectangular glass panels, completely enveloped by a thin, unchanging layer of water due to the perpetual rain. The shape of the structures is malformed and random, albeit not to as substantial of a degree as the highways. Strangely, the edifices may alter their whereabouts while unobserved; when this occurs, other structures will take their places. As briefly aforementioned, '''Level 178''''s name derives from the mysterious phenomena that frequently befall the city. Though these episodes are tremendously destructive, no instances of harm being done to wanderers or the highways through these circumstances have ever occurred, and the city seems to rematerialize instantaneously after an episode concludes. While listing every possible event is infeasible, a frequent instance of these phenomena is immense combustion spreading throughout the area. These fires are vast and will quickly engulf the city, swiftly demolishing it. Yet, seconds following the area's collapse, the city will be restored as though nothing occurred. Another recurrent anomaly of note is calamitous flooding originating from an indiscernible origin. Once again, the buildings crumble from the disaster, only to reemerge soon afterwards. ==Entities== It is infeasible to determine the presence of entities on '''Level 178'''. ==Colonies and Outposts== Due to the nature of the level, establishing a colony or outpost is impossible. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== There are six known entrances to '''Level 178'''. *Travelling far enough in '''[[Level 166]]'''; *Encountering an automobile in '''[[Level 100]]'''; *Walking through a fire in '''[[Level 690]]'''. All injuries undergone will disappear; *Climbing the stairs in the apartments of '''[[Level 177]]'''. ===Exits=== There are four known exits from '''Level 178'''. *At the end of the ride, one will be transported to a '''[[Special:RandomInCategory/Levels|random level]]'''; *Noclipping will lead to '''[[Level 166]]'''; *In certain cases, the automobile of '''Level 178''' shall drive into a body of water, which will initiate a teleportation to '''[[Level 910]]''' if one drowns. *It is likely that a highway tunnel may appear. If an individual rides through it, they will be transported to '''[[Level 151]]'''. ----
